title: FactEvent
description: Schema for a single entry in the append-only fact event ledger (.github/ai-state/fact-events.ndjson). Each entry records an observable fact about the AI-native control plane. Aligned with docs/ai-native/fact-event-schema.md.

eventType.description: Dot-namespaced event type. E.g. worker.launch, health.red, provider.exhausted.

subject.description: What the event is about. E.g. issue number, branch name, file path. Null if not applicable.

facts.description: Key-value pairs with event-specific data. String values are sanitized before writing. Null if not applicable.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event was recorded.

actor.description: What produced the event. E.g. script name, worker id, orchestrator. Null if not applicable.
